summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Data Storyteller Studio MVP - all core features working successfully including workspace management, CSV upload with data profiling, chat interface with AI analysis, story tile creation, storyboard generation, and PDF/PPTX export functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally blocks send button clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Use Enter key or force=True clicks

passed_tests: CSV file upload and data profiling
Navigation between Workspace, Chat & Charts, Storyboard views
Chat interface with natural language queries
AI-powered data analysis with chart generation
Save chat answers as Story Tiles
Chart rendering with amber color theme
